news.paragraph: Datadog is experiencing positive sentiment following a price target upgrade from Daiwa Securities to $240 and reports that AI adoption is driving strong growth. Traders should remain mindful of sector-wide volatility, as competitor Dynatrace recently saw its shares fall despite an earnings beat due to mixed guidance. This suggests that future guidance will be a critical factor for the stock's direction.
headlines: Daiwa Securities Adjusts Price Target on Datadog to $240 From $190, Maintains Buy Rating
DDOG Q1 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Product Expansion Drive Strong Growth
Dynatrace Earnings Beat Estimates. The Software Stock Is Falling Anyway.
Dynatrace Stock Falls On Fiscal Q4 Earnings, Mixed 2027 Guidance
Datadog Stock Went from Zero to Hero as AI Demand Drives Results
Daily – Vickers Top Buyers & Sellers for 05/13/2026
